scripts.test: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v && npm run test:worker
scripts.d1:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 execute constellation --local --file worker/schema.sql --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute constellation --remote --file worker/schema.sql --config worker/wrangler.toml
